# SECURITY POLICY

## Supportes Versions

Argus is a forward looking project. Only the latest and most current version is supported

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Security conserns can be submitted [_here_][report_url] without risk of exposing sensitive infomation. For issue that are low severity or unlikely to see exploitation, public issue are often acceptable.

[report-url]: https://github.com/Beatrix-labs/argus/security/advisories/new
